name: Personal Data Protection Act
description: Singapore's Personal Data Protection Act 2012 — governs the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data by organizations. Significantly amended in 2020 with mandatory breach notification.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.

license.notes: Government publication. Verify per-jurisdiction reuse terms.

current_extraction.notes: Full HTML acquired via Playwright from https://sso.agc.gov.sg/Act/PDPA2012?WholeDoc=1 (the ?WholeDoc=1 query expands SSO's lazy-loaded provisions into a single document). extract_pdpa.py parses the rendered HTML into per-section structured CSV/JSON (86 sections across 13 Parts).
